_README: THE ONLY FILE YOU EDIT to import OSRS items. Add an entry to 'items', then run import-osrs-items.ps1 from the repo root. Full docs: docs/osrs-item-import.md

_fields.newId: REQUIRED. New 2009scape item id. Next free id: see _nextFreeId below; keep ids contiguous.
_fields.osrsId: REQUIRED. The OSRS item id (look up on the OSRS wiki infobox or data/import/osrs_items.json).
_fields.name: Optional. Defaults to the OSRS name.
_fields.examine: Optional. Defaults to the OSRS examine text.
_fields.configTemplate: Optional. A native 2009 item id whose server config combat fields (anims, weapon_interface, audios) are cloned. REQUIRED for weapons. Suggested: stab spear 11379, sword 1305, warhammer 1347, crossbow 9185, bow 861, defender 8850.
_fields.attackSpeed: Optional. Weapon attack speed in ticks (overrides template).
_fields.wornPriority: Optional. Global render priority for worn models. Defaults by slot: weapon/shield/hands 10, head 7, neck 4, cape/feet/body/legs 0.
_fields.rigRefMale / rigRefFemale: Optional. 2009 model ids used for nearest-bone rigging when the OSRS model has no vskins. Defaults by slot (see docs).
_fields.wornDy: Optional. Vertical offset (+down) applied to worn model vertices. Use for fine alignment. Weapon/shield slots default to +11 (ferocious gloves rig-center delta).
_fields.facePriority: Optional. Uniform per-face render priority override for worn models. Capes inherit fire-cape rig ref per-face priorities automatically.
_fields.skipWorn: Optional bool. Force inventory-only import (auto-true when OSRS has no worn models, e.g. rings).
_fields.requirements: Optional. Server requirements string like '{0,75}-{1,75}' (skill ids: 0 atk, 1 def, 2 str, 3 hp, 4 range, 5 pray, 6 magic). Defaults to the OSRS requirements when gating is enabled.
_fields.gated: Optional bool, default false. When false the item is imported WITHOUT level requirements (try-on mode). Flip to true and re-run the pipeline to apply OSRS requirements.
_fields.legacyGeometry: Optional bool. Use ImportOsrsItemModels bespoke worn-model geometry (14659-14661 cuff flare, rig-center dy, faceguard neck align). Icon cameras come from OSRS extraction (identity import).
_fields.iconZoom / iconXan / iconYan / iconZan /: Optional. Override OSRS icon camera only after RenderClientItemIconSheet contact-sheet tuning (rare; identity import + OSRS cameras are usually pixel-perfect).
